refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics
Structured performance requirements database with versioning
Update management system for baselines and calibration history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance metrics; Structured performance requirements database with versioning; Update management system for baselines and calibration history

potential_sources: Data flow between derivation engine and database
Update management accessing and modifying database entries
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically coupled but modular; clear interfaces can maintain low coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not synchronized
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and synchronization mechanisms between DP components to mitigate coupling risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized system-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs performance targets and updates to other system modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange for updates and synchronization with external systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core functionality aligns with NGHE Solution; low diffusion risk.
Low containment; performance derivation is not vehicle-specific; high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Minimal containment; unrelated to teleoperation control; high diffusion risk.
Some relevance due to safety criticality but primary function is performance management, not safety alerts.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management within NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and history maintenance.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module if not properly modularized internally
Interface overload if too many external data sources are integrated without clear boundaries
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Modularize internal components within NGHE Solution and define clear interface contracts to external modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly maps to selected DPs with logical separation and traceability; verification approach is feasible.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk by centralizing in NGHE Solution
Risk mitigated by modular internal design
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution; external interfaces are well defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented performance targets and history logs within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define internal modularization within NGHE Solution to handle derivation, recording, and update management distinctly.
Clarify interface protocols on Telemetry and Network Link to ensure data integrity.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the requirements, constraints, and architectural guidelines with acceptable risk and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: Internal modularization within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle required data volumes and processing
open_risks: Potential interface overload if additional external data sources are added
Synchronization issues in update management if not properly designed
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from worksite inputs to performance targets
History logs showing baseline and calibration update management
